name: reader
description: Reader-friendly Cloudflare Worker for safer, cleaner web reading.
author: Mikael Vesavuori

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && esbuild worker.js --bundle --minify --platform=browser --format=esm --target=es2022 --outfile=dist/worker.js
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler deploy dist/worker.js
scripts.release:bundle: npm run build && cp package.json README.md LICENSE dist/
scripts.release:zip: npm run release:bundle && cd dist && zip -r ../reader_release.zip .
